'''bazhuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadman|leadman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadman|leadman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bazhuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzhivith|bæzhivith]] || [[word:bæzhivij|bæzhivij]] || [[word:bæzhivish|bæzhivish]] || [[word:bæzhivi|bæzhivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhuzhuvuth|bazhuzhuvuth]] || [[word:bazhuzhuvuj|bazhuzhuvuj]] || [[word:bazhuzhuvush|bazhuzhuvush]] || [[word:bazhuzhuvu|bazhuzhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhuvuth|bazhuvuth]] || [[word:bazhuvuj|bazhuvuj]] || [[word:bazhuvush|bazhuvush]] || [[word:bazhuvu|bazhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhufvuth|bazhufvuth]] || [[word:bazhufvuj|bazhufvuj]] || [[word:bazhufvush|bazhufvush]] || [[word:bazhufvuf|bazhufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazhuvuthu|bazhuvuthu]] || [[word:bazhuvuju|bazhuvuju]] || [[word:bazhuvushu|bazhuvushu]] || [[word:bazhuvuku|bazhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazhuvuth|bazhuvuth]] || [[word:bazhuvuj|bazhuvuj]] || [[word:bazhuvush|bazhuvush]] || [[word:bazhuvu|bazhuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazhuvuthul|bazhuvuthul]] || [[word:bazhuvujul|bazhuvujul]] || [[word:bazhuvushul|bazhuvushul]] || [[word:bazhuvukul|bazhuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazhuvuthuthu|bazhuvuthuthu]] || [[word:bazhuvujuju|bazhuvujuju]] || [[word:bazhuvushushu|bazhuvushushu]] || [[word:bazhuvuku|bazhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazhuvuthun|bazhuvuthun]] || [[word:bazhuvujun|bazhuvujun]] || [[word:bazhuvushun|bazhuvushun]] || [[word:bazhuvukun|bazhuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazhuvuthuoro|bazhuvuthuoro]] || [[word:bazhuvujuoro|bazhuvujuoro]] || [[word:bazhuvushuoro|bazhuvushuoro]] || [[word:bazhuvukuoro|bazhuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
